name: Lake Mead Water Level Analysis - Nevada/Arizona
description: Water level comparison at Lake Mead reservoir between 2020 and 2025, analyzing drought impact on the Colorado River Basin's largest reservoir using NDWI satellite analysis.
user_question: Compare water levels at Lake Mead, Nevada this year and five years ago.

tool_calls.name: find_location_boundary
tool_calls.result: Found boundary for Lake Mead reservoir

tool_calls.name: display_visual
tool_calls.result: Displayed reservoir analysis area boundary on map

tool_calls.name: get_rasters
tool_calls.result: Retrieved satellite imagery for 2020-09-27 (baseline water levels)

tool_calls.name: get_rasters
tool_calls.result: Retrieved satellite imagery for 2025-10-01 (current water levels)

tool_calls.name: display_visual
tool_calls.result: Displayed current satellite image showing reduced water levels

tool_calls.name: run_bandmath
tool_calls.result: Calculated NDWI (Normalized Difference Water Index) for 2020 baseline

tool_calls.name: run_bandmath
tool_calls.result: Calculated NDWI (Normalized Difference Water Index) for current state

tool_calls.name: display_visual
tool_calls.result: Displayed 2020 baseline NDWI showing water coverage

tool_calls.name: display_visual
tool_calls.result: Displayed current NDWI showing significant water loss

tool_calls.name: calculator
tool_calls.result: Computed drought impact: 31.5 km² (10.9%) water loss, 33.9 km² (19.6%) exposed lakebed increase
